meridianR 0.0.0.9000

Direct handle to the Meridian Python module

Source: R/tethers.R
meridian.Rd

meridian is a module proxy that exposes the underlying Meridian Python package directly, e.g. meridian$model$model$Meridian or meridian$data$load$CsvDataLoader. It is the low-level escape hatch beneath the R wrappers: anything reachable from Python is reachable here.

Usage

meridian

Format

An object of class python.builtin.module (inherits from python.builtin.object) of length 0.

Value

A Python module proxy (an object of class python.builtin.module).

Details

The module is imported lazily. The first time you touch meridian$..., reticulate initializes Python (provisioning an environment via install_meridian() or reticulate::py_require() if needed).

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
meridian$`__version__`
} # }
